title: rubus hirtus var. spinifer
intro: Rubus hirtus var. spinifer is a type of thorny raspberry plant native to Europe and North Africa, characterized by its thorny stems and edible fruits. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. spinifer include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water, creating a tea or decoction that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
